message:
feat: add TOON output format support to graph command

Wire up is_toon() / ctx.toon() for single-graph and all-graph code
paths so BR_OUTPUT_FORMAT=toon emits structured TOON instead of JSON.
Includes e2e test verifying round-trip decode of graph output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
